headline: A Fresh Look At McDonald's (MCD) Valuation After Recent Mixed Share Price Moves
summary: Why McDonald's (MCD) Is On Investors' Radar Today McDonald's (MCD) is back in focus after recent trading left the stock modestly positive year to date, while showing a 1 day gain and small pullbacks over the past week and month. See our latest analysis for McDonald's. Recent trading paints a mixed picture, with a modestly positive year to date share price return of 1.22% alongside a 5.93% 1 month share price pullback, while 5 year total shareholder return of 47.62% reflects a steadier long...

headline: This Will Be McDonald’s Stock Price Next Year
summary: McDonald’s (NYSE:MCD) trades at $311.53 as of writing. Our 24/7 Wall St. price target for McDonald’s is $342, implying 9.7% upside over the next 12 months. The 24/7 Wall St. recommendation is buy, with a 90% confidence level. McDonald’s executed a V-shaped recovery through 2025, its loyalty platform is scaling rapidly, and valuation remains reasonable ... This Will Be McDonald’s Stock Price Next Year

headline: IAB Hong Kong Digital Awards 2025 Honours Brilliance in Digital Marketing
summary: The "IAB Hong Kong Digital Awards 2025" concluded successfully on 16 March at M+ AGATE, celebrating outstanding achievements in Hong Kong's digital marketing industry. The event brought together more than 300 marketing professionals, agency executives, and brand leaders to celebrate excellence in an increasingly complex digital landscape. Miss Drew Lai, Commissioner for Cultural and Creative Industries, graced the occasion as Guest of Honour.

headline: PepsiCo’s Lower Snack Prices Dish Up an Earnings Win
summary: If McDonalds struggled to sell $6 cheeseburgers, it’s no wonder Pepsi’s Frito-Lay brand struggled to sell $6 bags of Doritos.
